examples: The sportive sun, the gibbous moon.
The planet Jupiter blazes near the waxing gibbous moon tonight.
The moon grew from crescent to gibbous, and suddenly the toads were gone.
And then we let the Lake Placid Lodge do what it does best: another fine meal, another gibbous moon, another night to sleep by the light of the fireplace.
The Waxing Gibbous Moon - the lunar phase between first quarter Moon and a full Moon - will be approximately one degree south of Jupiter appearing to be only a pen width apart.
